summary: Backend API testing completed for Vivo BI Dashboard iteration 2. All 21 tests passed covering new endpoints: /api/kpis, /api/top-skus, /api/sor, /api/daily-trend, /api/analytics/kpis-plus, /api/analytics/highlights, /api/analytics/by-country, /api/analytics/inventory-summary (with markets field), /api/analytics/low-stock. Verified no /sales dependency remains.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper async HTTP client management and 45s timeout
Good _is_excluded helper filters shopping bags/gift vouchers correctly in kpis-plus
sell_through_rate computed correctly from /sor data (units_sold / (units_sold + current_stock))
inventory-summary correctly includes 'markets' field (count of countries)
seed_data_creation: None - uses external Vivo BI API data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend endpoints working. External API has data for date range 2026-04-01 to 2026-04-17. Verified: 3 countries (Uganda, Kenya, Rwanda). Old endpoints removed: /api/sales, /api/analytics/overview, /api/analytics/top-products, /api/analytics/top-brands, /api/analytics/product-types. New test file: test_vivo_bi_api_v2.py
